# customerconnect_access_policy (Resource)

Manages a NetFoundry AccessPolicy (backed by a Ziti dial service policy).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `destinations` (Attributes List) Destination endpoints. Each entry must have exactly one of connector_id, location_id, or connector_model_id set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--destinations))
- `name` (String) Display name of the access policy.
- `provider_id` (String) Provider this access policy belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `sources` (Attributes List) Source endpoints. Each entry must have exactly one of connector_id, location_id, or connector_model_id set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sources))

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the access policy.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when this access policy was created.
- `created_by` (String) Identity that created this access policy.
- `deleted_at` (String) Timestamp when this access policy was deleted.
- `deleted_by` (String) Identity that deleted this access policy.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the access policy is currently projected onto the network. Controlled by the API based on linked resource states.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the access policy.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when this access policy was last updated.
- `ziti_name` (String) Name of the underlying Ziti dial service policy.

<a id="nestedatt--destinations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `destinations`

Optional:

- `connector_id` (String) Source/destination connector UUID.
- `connector_model_id` (String) Source/destination connector model UUID — matches any connector attached to the given model.
- `location_id` (String) Source/destination location UUID.


<a id="nestedatt--sources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sources`

Optional:

- `connector_id` (String) Source/destination connector UUID.
- `connector_model_id` (String) Source/destination connector model UUID — matches any connector attached to the given model.
- `location_id` (String) Source/destination location UUID.
